Package com.mentor.chs.plugin

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    IXApplicationContext
    This object allows any IXPlugin to have access to a number of very useful objects.
    IXApplicationContextListener
    Any plugin can implement this interface.
    IXAttributeSetter
    Interface for storing attribute/property changes to be applied to an object.
    IXAvailability
    This interface provides a means of identifying whether this plugin, be it an IXAction or an IXInspectionPanel, is currently available for use within the tool.
    IXBaseApplicationContext
    This object allows any IXPlugin to have access to a number of objects that are common to the Design and Symbol applications.
    IXBaseContext
    Provides data access to the object in the system for plugin use
    IXBaseCurrentContext
    Interface that provides contextual information to custom actions/plugins that are common to design tools and capitalsymbol.
    IXBaseSymbolContext
    Provides data access to the object in the system for plugin use in Capital Symbol.
    IXComponentSelectionContext
    This object allows any IXScopeFilter to have access to useful objects to evaluate the scope.
    IXCurrentContext
    Single Class that provides contextual information to actions/plugins.
    IXCurrentSymbolContext
    Interface that provides contextual information to custom actions/plugins in Capital Symbol.
    IXDesignLog
    This interface gives access to the design logs.
    IXFunctionDesignPlugin
    Implement this along with any plugin interface annotated as DesignSpecificImplementation to make the plugin available for Function design applications.
    IXHarnessPlugin
    Implement this along with any plugin interface annotated as DesignSpecificImplementation to make the plugin available for Harness design applications.
    IXIntegratorPlugin
    Implement this along with any plugin interface annotated as DesignSpecificImplementation to make the plugin available for Integrator design applications.
    IXLanguageProvider
    Service provider interface for providing languages in Capital
    IXLogicPlugin
    Implement this along with any plugin interface annotated as DesignSpecificImplementation to make the plugin available for Logic design applications.
    IXOutputPrinter
    This is used to print the output messages
    IXOutputWindow
    Allows custom plugins to display information to the output window.
    IXPlugin
    This is the parent interface for all plug-in interfaces.
    IXPrintServiceProvider
    Service provider interface for providing print service
    IXPrintServices
    Class exposing print (to file) services.
    IXPropertySetter
    Interface for storing property changes to be applied to an object.
    IXQueryExpressionFactoryProvider
    Service provider interface for providing access to query expressions
    IXSymbolContext
    This object allows any IXPlugin to have access to a number of very useful objects in Symbol Application.
    IXSymbolLibraryProvider
    Service provider interface for providing symbollibrary
    IXSystemContext
    IXSystemContext is the interface through which any custom task gets access to the general resources like project
    IXTabPanel
    The base panel provider inteface to be used for Output window, inspection panal or design tab capabilities.
    IXTopologyPlugin
    Implement this along with any plugin interface annotated as DesignSpecificImplementation to make the plugin available for Topology design applications.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    IXDesignLogSeverityEnum
    The severity of the message that will be logged
  • Annotation Types Summary 
    Annotation Type Description
    DesignSpecificImplementation
    This Annotation marks the plugin interfaces whose implementation should additionally implement a design specific interface like IXLogicPlugin for Logic designs, IXHarnessPlugin for Harness designs etc.
    NotToBeImplementedDirectly
    This Annotation marks the plugin interfaces that should not be implemented directly.
    OnlyOneImplementationAllowed
    This Annotation marks the plugin interfaces that only one implementation of this type is allowed.
